### :hammer_and_wrench: Tools & Scripts

* [EXIF Rename][@exif-rename-py]                    <sub>![#py] ![#last-commit.exif-rename-py]</sub>      &mdash; Rename files using their EXIF data
* [TB Filter Rules Generator][@tb-filter-rules-gen] <sub>![#py] ![#last-commit.tb-filter-rules-gen]</sub> &mdash; Generate Thunderbird email filters
* [Hiccup Remedy][@exif-rename-py]                  <sub>![#py] ![#last-updated.hiccup-remedy]</sub>      &mdash; Czkawka Duplicate Finder Wrapper
